title: Routers & Switches 🚦
description: The traffic cops of the internet.

slides.title: The Road Network 🚦
slides.content:
### Moving Data Safely

How does a packet know where to go? It needs help from two specialized hardwares:

1.  **Switches**: The boss of a single building (Local Network).
2.  **Routers**: The bridge between cities (Different Networks).

slides.title: The Switch (L2) 🔗
slides.content:
### Connecting Friends

A **Switch** connects devices within the same network. It uses **MAC addresses** to send data only to the correct port.

*   **Metaphor**: A switch is like a private intercom system in an office building.

slides.title: The Router (L3) 🗺️
slides.content:
### Connecting Worlds

A **Router** connects two or more different networks. It uses **IP addresses** to find the best route across the internet.

*   **Metaphor**: A router is the post office that ships your mail to another state.

quizData.question: Which device is responsible for connecting your home network to the rest of the world (the internet)?
quizData.explanation: A router bridges the gap between your local network (LAN) and the wider internet (WAN).
